basic_details.job_title: ABV IIITM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Engineer & Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee-Indian Institute of Information Technology & Management, Gwalior
basic_details.short_information: The Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (ABV IIITM) has officially announced the Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 04 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years (Assistant Engineer) and 32 years (Junior Engineer) and hold qualifications such as Diploma/Degree in Engineering with relevant experience can now submit their offline applications before 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Engineer: Max 35 years (OBC), Junior Engineer: Max 32 years (SC)
age_limit.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms. Junior Engineer (Civil): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation for SC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Degree in Engineering with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): 1st Class Diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Degree as per the nomenclature recognized by AICTE as Diploma in Electrical Engineering, along with 08 Years of post qualification Experience. 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Degree as per the nomenclature recognized by AICTE in Electrical Engineering Stream with 06 Years of post qualification Experience. Experience must be in regular scale obtained from institutions like IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs IISERs or similar such Centrally/State funded institutions/Government Organizations/Public Sectors Units. Work experience obtained during the qualifying academic programme/s must not be considered. Junior Engineer (Civil): 1st Class Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent Diploma as per the nomenclature recognized by AICTE as Diploma in Civil Engineering Stream with 05 Years of post qualification Experience. 1st Class B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or equivalent Degree as per the nomenclature recognized by AICTE in Civil Engineering Stream with 02 Years of post qualification Experience. Experience must be in regular scale obtained from institutions like IITs/IISc/IIMs/IIITs/NITs /IISERs or similar such Centrally funded institutions/Government Organizations/ Public Sectors Units. Work experience obtained during the qualifying academic programme/s must not be considered.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 7 and Level 6 as per 7th CPC

selection_process: Written Test Interview Trade Test Game Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ABV IIITM Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: iiitm.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
